name: Centriquip
answerBox: Centrifuge World is an independent specialist in Centriquip decanter centrifuge repair and rebuilds. With Centriquip manufacturing wound down, we provide skilled, cost-effective service for existing installations, including the CQ5000, from our Texas and Illinois service centers with reconditioning, balancing, parts fabrication, and 24/7 emergency support.
intro: Centriquip built decanter centrifuges near Chesterfield, England until manufacturing ended following a change of ownership, driving up service costs and making support for existing installations harder to find. Centrifuge World gives Centriquip owners a technically capable, experienced, and affordable independent option for repair, rebuild, and ongoing maintenance.
disclosure: Centrifuge World is an independent repair and rebuild specialist. We are not affiliated with Centriquip.

capabilities.detail: We provide complete reconditioning and repair for Centriquip decanter centrifuges, restoring separation performance and reliability.
We rebuild bowls and conveyor scrolls, resurface wear zones, and replace worn tiles and flights to recover throughput and cake dryness.
Rebuilt rotating assemblies are balanced to eliminate vibration and protect bearings, seals, and drive components.
With OEM support limited, we reverse engineer and fabricate hard-to-find Centriquip parts in-house, often within a few days.

body: Centriquip produced decanter centrifuges near Chesterfield, England until manufacturing ended after a change of ownership. That transition increased service costs and made support for existing after-sales installations increasingly difficult to obtain. For plants still running Centriquip equipment, dependable independent service is now essential to protect the investment.

Centrifuge World is a recognized provider of maintenance and repair for decanter centrifuges of all makes and specializes in service and repair of all Centriquip models. Owners of existing installations gain a legitimate option that is technically skilled, experienced, and, most importantly, competitively priced. We service Centriquip equipment including the CQ5000.

As a one-stop shop we provide full reconditioning and repair for industrial decanter centrifuges. Our scope includes standard maintenance, weld repair of damaged areas, refitting of wear parts such as O-rings and gaskets, replacement of worn or damaged items, engineered upgrades, static and dynamic balancing, and a test run where the equipment allows. Repairs are completed in our service centers in the Houston, Texas and Chicago, Illinois areas.

We maintain a large inventory of parts for Centriquip centrifuges, and because OEM support is limited, our shop can reverse engineer and fabricate hard-to-find components in-house, frequently within a few days. Combined with 24/7 emergency response, Centrifuge World keeps your Centriquip decanters running with minimal downtime.

faqs.question: Can you still service Centriquip decanter centrifuges now that manufacturing has ended?
faqs.answer: Yes. Centrifuge World specializes in service and repair of all Centriquip decanter models, including the CQ5000, giving owners of existing installations a technically skilled, experienced, and affordable independent option.

faqs.question: Do you supply parts for Centriquip centrifuges?
faqs.answer: We keep a large inventory of Centriquip parts, and because OEM support is limited, our shop reverse engineers and fabricates hard-to-find components in-house, often within a few days.

faqs.question: Where is the work performed?
faqs.answer: Centriquip repairs are completed in our service centers in the Houston, Texas and Chicago, Illinois areas, with pickup, transport, and 24/7 emergency response available.
